warnings: Current bC3M-specific final terms were not located and the English KID link returned 404.
The current legal evidence is primarily issuer-level rather than complete product-level documentation.
No bC3M-specific reserve breakdown, collateral ratio, reserve audit, attestation, assurance report, auditor, or proof-of-reserves mechanism was verified.
Redemption remains available for existing holders, but settlement time, minimum amount, settlement asset, process, and suspension conditions were not verified.
New bToken issuance is closed, limiting primary-market growth and making the product operationally redemption-only for existing holders.
CoinGecko reports zero 24-hour volume and identifies the displayed price as the last recorded price rather than active price discovery.
Market capitalization and supply rely on a secondary aggregator and must not be treated as issuer-reported AUM or NAV.
Only Ethereum is verified as a product-level bC3M deployment; seven other networks remain unresolved and are not represented as deployments.
Custodian relationships are issuer-published and were not independently confirmed through service-provider documentation.
Investor access is limited to professional or qualified investors, excludes U.S. persons, and includes conditional UK restrictions.
status: research-grade baseline under asset_backed profile after agent-team source verification
nextActions: Obtain a current bC3M-specific final terms document and working KID URL, then reassess legalScore.
Locate an official bC3M reserve, collateral, holdings, audit, attestation, or assurance report and update reserve evidence without inferring proof-of-reserves.
Confirm the official direct-redemption settlement period, settlement asset, minimum amount, processing steps, and suspension conditions.
Refresh market price, market capitalization, supply, and volume only from a source that clearly distinguishes last-recorded values from active trading.
Verify whether any product-level bC3M deployments exist on Gnosis, Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Fantom, BNB Smart Chain, or Base before adding them back.
Seek independent confirmation of custodian and service-provider roles from the named institutions or product-specific legal documents.
Reassess grade eligibility only after legal, reserve, redemption, and market-liquidity evidence materially improves.
